commands.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "Permission Audit Hermes Evidence Packet Decision Binding" packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js

preliminary_expected_failure.failure_reason: CP00-078 evidence files were not created yet; contract and closeout rows already pointed at docs/closeout-packs/cp00-078.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json "$(cat /tmp/cp00-078-review-prompt.txt)"

invalid_claude_attempts.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json "$(cat /tmp/cp00-078-review-prompt.txt)"
invalid_claude_attempts.reason: Sandboxed CLI could not access Claude authentication/keychain and returned Not logged in with zero input tokens; not counted as a valid pack-level review.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains metadata-bound; this pack creates no review queue, approval record, assignment, notification, Hermes evidence packet write, command evidence write, or product-state write.
evidence_summary.ledger_boundary_confirmation: docs/weighted-implementation-ledger.json confirms RP00.P06.M07 has 20 subphases and terminates at RP00.P06.M07.S20.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-078 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime permission, AuthZ, security trimming, audit, Hermes evidence packet writes, command evidence writes, fixture, test, golden, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, approval, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.

plan_generation_receipt.purpose: Regenerated closeout pack plan and next-pack queue after CP00-078 evidence assembly.
plan_generation_receipt.result_summary: Plan generated with 1175 packs and 53829 units; next queue starts after CP00-078.
